tasks: Install the flatpak package if it is not already installed.
Configure a system Flatpak remote named rhcsa10 that points to file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo with GPG verification disabled.
checks: (flatpak remotes --system --columns=name,url 2>/dev/null | awk '$1 == "rhcsa10" && $2 == "file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo" {found=1} END {exit !found}') && (flatpak remotes --system --columns=name 2>/dev/null | grep -qx rhcsa10)
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
